name: Telemost — webhook: саммари из БД или JSON

parameters.jsCode:
const msg = $input.first().json._error || 'Invalid request';
throw new Error(msg);

parameters.query: SELECT COALESCE(mt.title, '') AS title, COALESCE(mt.transcript, '') AS transcript, $2::text AS chat_id, $3::text AS source FROM public.meeting_transcripts mt WHERE mt.id = $1::bigint LIMIT 1
